home.title: ScoreMatrix | Football Predictions, Live Scores and Rewards
home.description: ScoreMatrix is a skill-based football prediction platform with live scores, AI match insights, leaderboards, missions and redeemable rewards. No real money gambling.
home.keywords: football predictions, soccer predictions, live scores, AI football analysis, football rewards, prediction leaderboard, skill-based prediction game, no gambling football app

matches.title: Matches | ScoreMatrix Football Schedule and Live Match Center
matches.description: Explore live, upcoming and finished football matches across global leagues with form trends, match status, kickoff times and prediction entry points on ScoreMatrix.
matches.keywords: football matches, match schedule, live football matches, upcoming matches, football fixtures, soccer fixtures, match center, ScoreMatrix matches

news.title: News & Analysis | ScoreMatrix Football News
news.description: Read the latest football news, match reports, prediction tips, and platform updates on ScoreMatrix. Stay informed with daily articles across global leagues.
news.keywords: football news, match reports, prediction tips, football analysis, soccer news, ScoreMatrix news, football articles

seoContent.title: Football match predictions, live scores and rewards in one platform
seoContent.description: ScoreMatrix brings match schedules, live football scores, AI-powered insight, prediction missions and leaderboard competition into one skill-based experience. Players earn points through football knowledge and consistency, then redeem those points for digital and merchandise rewards without cash withdrawal or real-money gambling.

predictions.text: Review team form, head-to-head notes, kickoff times and AI confidence before submitting your match prediction.

liveScores.text: Follow live match status, scores and upcoming fixtures across European and Asian football leagues.

rewards.title: Earn rewards safely
rewards.text: Complete missions, climb leaderboards and redeem points for non-cash rewards in a transparent entertainment platform.

formula.pointsEarnedExpression: points_earned = stake + (base + bonus) × confidence × boost + streak
formula.streakNote: streak is documented as streak_number × 2 and is not active yet
formula.wrongNote: If the side is wrong, points = 0 and the full stake is lost

worldCup2026.title: World Cup 2026 Groups
worldCup2026.description: Pick Group A-L to scan teams, standings and matchup cards in a quick sports-results layout.
worldCup2026.timeZone: Times shown in Thailand time: Asia/Bangkok (UTC+7)
worldCup2026.sourceNote: Before kickoff, every team starts on 0 points. The table is ordered by group draw position for quick scanning.

spotlights.A: Opening path: Mexico City, Guadalajara, Atlanta
spotlights.B: Canada starts at home with a tight European test
spotlights.C: Brazil and Morocco headline one of the most watchable groups
spotlights.D: The United States route runs through Paraguay, Australia and Turkiye
spotlights.E: Germany meets Ecuador, Cote d’Ivoire and Curacao
spotlights.F: Netherlands, Japan, Sweden and Tunisia bring four distinct styles
spotlights.G: Belgium, Egypt and Iran chase control against New Zealand
spotlights.H: Spain and Uruguay share a group with Saudi Arabia and Cape Verde
spotlights.I: France, Senegal, Norway and Iraq make the heavy traffic group
spotlights.J: Argentina starts the defense against Algeria, Austria and Jordan
spotlights.K: Portugal faces Colombia, Uzbekistan and DR Congo
spotlights.L: England, Croatia, Ghana and Panama close the group map

lockedAccess.title: Join this event to unlock competition data
lockedAccess.description: Members who have not joined can view the overview, rules, entry cost, and rewards only. Match details and the leaderboard are available to event participants.
lockedAccess.unlockHint: Use the registration panel to unlock matches and rankings.

howToPlay.title: How to Compete
howToPlay.subtitle: Follow these 5 steps to compete for rewards in this event
howToPlay.step1Desc: Pay {points} pts + {credits} credits to confirm your entry
howToPlay.step1FreeDesc: This event is free to join! Just click enter and you're ready to compete
howToPlay.step2Desc: Go to the Predict page and predict scores for matches in this event — every correct prediction adds points to your event ranking automatically
howToPlay.step3Desc: Predictions are auto-scored after matches finish: exact score = 30 pts, correct result = 10-20 pts — plus bonuses for first goalscorer, half-time score, and confidence multipliers
howToPlay.step4Desc: Check your position against other competitors live in the Leaderboard tab — see exactly where you stand and how many points you need to climb to the top
howToPlay.step5Desc: When the event ends, final rankings are calculated and rewards are distributed automatically — points and credits land in your wallet instantly, plus exclusive badges on your profile! {tiers} reward tiers up for grabs
